clean_alternative: Keep SQL/API path fixed, require non-empty verified LLM answer content, keep answer_candidate_selector fallback, and evaluate with empty-answer guard before considering any answer-layer port.
leakage_or_hardcoding_found: No exact gold/category/tags/oracle/query_id metadata keys were found in the answer diagnostics payload; separate gold-pattern runtime scaffolding exists elsewhere in the repo and remains suspicious but is not the cause of this 0.8884 answer lift.
recommendation_note: The contamination is evaluator/report artifact rather than confirmed runtime gold leakage in the answer payload.
